---
id: connect-to-slack
title: "Get connect URL for Slack authentication"
description: "Returns URL to which user should be redirected to connect Slack workspace"
sidebar_label: "Get connect URL for Slack authentication"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: api//tolgee-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get connect URL for Slack authentication"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v2/organizations/{organizationId}/slack/get-connect-url"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns URL to which user should be redirected to connect Slack workspace

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
